title: AI, not news bargaining, is a bigger battle with big tech

title: Orders for Business Equipment Surge by the Most Since 2020 as AI Boom Rolls On

title: Google Translate turns 20: Sundar Pichai reflects on its journey to a billion users
description: Google Translate turns 20, with Sundar Pichai highlighting its evolution into a billion-user AI tool supporting nearly 250 languages. From simple text translation to real-time conversations and image recognition, the platform reflects Google’s broader push to make artificial intelligence more accessible, useful and globally inclusive.
